title: [HW] Add PruneZeroValuedLogic to PrepareForEmission
body:
Pruning is performed by marking an operation with a `pruned` string attr, detailing the reason for why the op was pruned.  
I did this, as opposed to my initial thought of erasing an operation and replacing the operation with an `sv.verbatim` comment, seeing as it's much easier to emit pretty, traceable verilog, when a pruned operation can be emitted as verilog (as opposed to a comment generated at pruning time which would have to be a dump of the mlir operation).

Furthermore this lays the ground work for a future refactor for ExportVerilog, wherein any decision to comment-out an expression has been made prior to emission by marking an operation as pruned. This has the added benefit of letting ExportVerilog know which operations will be commented out. Follow-up work should add pruning checks for:
* i0-value generating ops
* ops that generate unused results

This initial commit lays the groundwork for the pruning infrastructure, and adds pruning for SV assignment ops to fix https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/3983.
